effect.subject: callout style (main / secondary-data / text-heavy)
effect.reserved_for: at most one instance of a given style per screen or section

rule_text: There are three approved callout styles (Main callout, Secondary/data callout, Text-heavy callout); use them judiciously and never have two of the same style competing on one screen or section.
intent: Prevent visual redundancy and preserve callout hierarchy.
summary: Use three approved callout styles (Main, Secondary/data, Text-heavy); never have two identical styles competing on one screen or section.
